scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=site && node -e "const f='site/dist/server/wrangler.json',fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync(f)){const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));delete c.assets;delete c.kv_namespaces;if(c.triggers&&Object.keys(c.triggers).length===0)delete c.triggers;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(c,null,2));console.log('Patched',f,'for Cloudflare Pages compatibility')}"
